name: checkpoint dir lists checkpoints in chronological order via list command
command: mkdir -p compliance/audit-checkpoints && printf '{"interval":1}\n' > compliance/audit-checkpoints/checkpoint-1.json && printf '{"interval":2}\n' > compliance/audit-checkpoints/checkpoint-2.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/checkpoint-list.sh" --checkpoint-dir compliance/audit-checkpoints 2>out.txt && [ "$(grep -cE '^checkpoint=' out.txt)" = "2" ] && echo ok 1>&2
